docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF KONSTANTINE RADINOVICH RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF RADINOVICH, KONSTANTIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RADINOVICH, KONSTANTIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARFIL, CIPRIANO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,035.87 FILED BY RADINOVICH, KONSTANTIN AS TO DEFENDANT MARFIL, CIPRIANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
(SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS:[X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2020 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-10-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-27-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF KONSTANTIN RADINOVICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CIPRIANO MARFIL IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED TAGALOG INTERPRETER CAROLINE BERNABE. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT SON-IN-LAW. MS. BERNABE WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RE: COURT DECISION FILED BY PLAINTIFF RADINOVICH, KONSTANTIN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
